org.efs.feed
 

  • Uses of EfsFeedKey in org.efs.feed

    Methods in org.efs.feed that return EfsFeedKey
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <E extends IEfsEvent>
    EfsFeedKey<E>
    EfsFeedKey.getKey(Class<E> ec, String subject)
    Returns a unique efs feed key instance for given efs event class and feed subject.
    EfsFeedKey<E>
    EfsFeed.key()
    Returns key containing event class and subject.
    Methods in org.efs.feed with parameters of type EfsFeedKey
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <E extends IEfsEvent>
    EfsFeed<E>
    EfsFeed.openFeed(EfsFeedKey<E> key)
    Returns efs feed associated with the given feed key.
